subject: Re:
body:
sounds very intersteing


----- Original Message ----
From: "Spector, Edward (PBIG New York, NY (Downtown))" <edward_spector@ml.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, May 1, 2007 7:48:40 PM
Subject: 




Jeffrey,  just checking in.  We produced an index that we call the FACTOR INDEX that with 94% correlation replicates the Hedge Fund HFRI composite. Features include no carried interest like a Fund of Funds, daily liquidity, transparent pricing, potential long term cap gains vs. ordinary income.   FOF Hedge funds are generally 1% mgt fee and 10% carried interest. Factor Index charge is only 50-100bps per annum and no carried. 
Right now Fund of Funds are one of the buyers of this product from us. They use it for excess liquidity until they put $ to work. 
It can be done as investment or swap format.  
Maybe good for you or definitely to put in Abigail's portfolio.  What do you think? 
Ed 
Ed Spector, CIMA 
Vice President 
212 236 1660 (T) 
212 236 1644 (F)

All indications are subject to market conditions.
